summary: Iteration 16 - P0 Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed (1 skipped as expected). All frontend tests passed. The two critical P0 bugs have been fixed: (1) LLM retry logic now correctly passes system_message and session_prefix to send_with_retry, (2) Assessment Scaffolder now uses background job + polling pattern to avoid K8s 60s timeout. POST /api/scaffold returns {job_id, status:'processing'} immediately (<10s), GET /api/scaffold/status/{job_id} returns status updates and final result with all required keys.

issues: Guided tour popup appears on every visit - may want to persist dismissal

passed_tests: POST /api/scaffold without auth returns 401
POST /api/scaffold returns {job_id, status:'processing'} immediately (<10s, not timeout)
GET /api/scaffold/status/{job_id} returns status updates during processing
GET /api/scaffold/status/{job_id} returns {status:'complete', result:{...}} when done
Scaffold result has all required keys: overallGuidance, suggestedStructure (5-8 items), documentConnections, rubricAlignment, thinkingFramework, hiddenExpectations, commonMistakes, successTips
GET /api/scaffold/status/{invalid_job_id} returns 404
POST /api/decode-jargon works with large text (500+ words)
POST /api/essay/score works with essay text and rubric
POST /api/humanise works with academic text
POST /api/rubric/simplify works with rubric text
POST /api/concept/visualise works
All 6 protected tool endpoints return 401 without auth cookie
GET /api/auth/me works
GET /api/notifications works
GET /api/streak works
GET /api/briefs/history works
Frontend: Login works and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Assessment Scaffolder page loads at /assessment-scaffolder
Frontend: All 4 document upload zones visible (brief, rubric, outline, slides)
Frontend: Form fields work (assignment type, level, topic, word count)
Frontend: Submit button shows loading progress during scaffold generation
Frontend: Scaffold result displays Strategic Overview section
Frontend: Structure tab shows 7 sections with rubric criteria tags
Frontend: Thinking Framework tab works
Frontend: Hidden Expectations section visible
Frontend: Success Tips section visible
Frontend: New Scaffold button works to reset form
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Bug Fix 1 VERIFIED: send_with_retry now accepts system_message and session_prefix parameters, creates new LlmChat on retry with correct system message
P0 Bug Fix 2 VERIFIED: POST /api/scaffold returns immediately with job_id, background task runs LLM calls, polling via GET /api/scaffold/status/{job_id}
All tool endpoints (decode-jargon, essay/score, humanise, rubric/simplify, concept/visualise) correctly pass system_message and session_prefix to send_with_retry
In-memory _scaffold_jobs dict works for single-instance deployment, job cleaned up after first successful poll
Frontend AssessmentScaffolder.js correctly implements polling pattern with 3s interval, max 100 polls (5 min timeout)
Frontend shows loading progress messages during scaffold generation
Error handling: budget exceeded errors return human-readable messages ('AI credits have run out. Please top up...')

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 complete. P0 bug fixes verified: (1) LLM retry logic fixed - send_with_retry now correctly passes system_message and session_prefix to create new LlmChat on retry, (2) Assessment Scaffolder timeout fixed - converted to background job + polling pattern. POST /api/scaffold returns {job_id, status:'processing'} immediately. Poll GET /api/scaffold/status/{job_id} every 3-5s for up to 3 minutes. Status can be 'processing', 'complete', or 'error'. When complete, result contains: overallGuidance, suggestedStructure (5-8 sections with criticalThinking, rubricCriteria, lectureLinks), documentConnections, rubricAlignment, thinkingFramework (Bloom's taxonomy), hiddenExpectations, commonMistakes, successTips. Job is cleaned up from in-memory store after first successful poll. All tool endpoints working with realistic payloads (500+ words). Cookie-based auth working.
